'''鈭歾h-zh-l''' ('''zhazhala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:finangle|finangle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:finangle|finangle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-zh-l
|-
! Lemma
| zhazhala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhazhalithi|zhazhalithi]] || [[word:zhazhaliji|zhazhaliji]] || [[word:zhazhalishi|zhazhalishi]] || [[word:zhazhali|zhazhali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhaluthuth|zhazhaluthuth]] || [[word:zhazhalujuj|zhazhalujuj]] || [[word:zhazhalushush|zhazhalushush]] || [[word:zhazhal|zhazhal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazhaluthu|zhazhaluthu]] || [[word:zhazhaluju|zhazhaluju]] || [[word:zhazhalushu|zhazhalushu]] || [[word:zhazhalu|zhazhalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhalufuth|zhazhalufuth]] || [[word:zhazhalufuj|zhazhalufuj]] || [[word:zhazhalufush|zhazhalufush]] || [[word:zhazhaluf|zhazhaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhazhalethe|zhazhalethe]] || [[word:zhazhaleje|zhazhaleje]] || [[word:zhazhaleshe|zhazhaleshe]] || [[word:zhazhale|zhazhale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhalothoth|zhazhalothoth]] || [[word:zhazhalojoj|zhazhalojoj]] || [[word:zhazhaloshosh|zhazhaloshosh]] || [[word:zhazhal|zhazhal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazhalotho|zhazhalotho]] || [[word:zhazhalojo|zhazhalojo]] || [[word:zhazhalosho|zhazhalosho]] || [[word:zhazhalo|zhazhalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhalofoth|zhazhalofoth]] || [[word:zhazhalofoj|zhazhalofoj]] || [[word:zhazhalofosh|zhazhalofosh]] || [[word:zhazhalof|zhazhalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhazhal忙th忙|zhazhal忙th忙]] || [[word:zhazhal忙j忙|zhazhal忙j忙]] || [[word:zhazhal忙sh忙|zhazhal忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhazhal忙|zhazhal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhalathath|zhazhalathath]] || [[word:zhazhalajaj|zhazhalajaj]] || [[word:zhazhalashash|zhazhalashash]] || [[word:zhazhal|zhazhal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazhalatha|zhazhalatha]] || [[word:zhazhalaja|zhazhalaja]] || [[word:zhazhalasha|zhazhalasha]] || [[word:zhazhala|zhazhala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhalafath|zhazhalafath]] || [[word:zhazhalafaj|zhazhalafaj]] || [[word:zhazhalafash|zhazhalafash]] || [[word:zhazhalaf|zhazhalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhazhalasha|zhazhalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhazhalasha|gozhazhalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhazhalasha|gokizhazhalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhazhaln眉sha|zhazhaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkn眉sha|gozhazhalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhazhaln眉sha|gokizhazhaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhazhalsh毛sha|zhazhalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhazhalnksh毛sha|gozhazhalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhazhalsh毛sha|gokizhazhalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhazhalrosha|zhazhalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkrosha|gozhazhalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhazhalrosha|gokizhazhalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhalmusha|zhazhalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkmusha|gozhazhalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhalmusha|gokizhazhalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhazhalsherasha|zhazhalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhazhalnksherasha|gozhazhalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhazhalsherasha|gokizhazhalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhazhalngasha|zhazhalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkngasha|gozhazhalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhazhalngasha|gokizhazhalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhazhalyasha|zhazhalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkyasha|gozhazhalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhazhalyasha|gokizhazhalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhazhalyamasha|zhazhalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkyamasha|gozhazhalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhazhalyamasha|gokizhazhalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhazhaln眉sh毛sha|zhazhaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhazhalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhazhaln眉sh毛sha|gokizhazhaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhazhaln眉rosha|zhazhaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkn眉rosha|gozhazhalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhazhaln眉rosha|gokizhazhaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhaln眉musha|zhazhaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkn眉musha|gozhazhalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhaln眉musha|gokizhazhaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhazhalsh毛n眉sha|zhazhalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhazhalnksh毛n眉sha|gozhazhalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhazhalsh毛n眉sha|gokizhazhalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhazhalsh毛rosha|zhazhalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhazhalnksh毛rosha|gozhazhalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhazhalsh毛rosha|gokizhazhalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhalsh毛musha|zhazhalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhalnksh毛musha|gozhazhalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhalsh毛musha|gokizhazhalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhazhalron眉sha|zhazhalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkron眉sha|gozhazhalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhazhalron眉sha|gokizhazhalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhazhalrosh毛sha|zhazhalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkrosh毛sha|gozhazhalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhazhalrosh毛sha|gokizhazhalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazhalromusha|zhazhalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkromusha|gozhazhalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazhalromusha|gokizhazhalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhazhalmun眉sha|zhazhalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkmun眉sha|gozhazhalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhazhalmun眉sha|gokizhazhalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhazhalmush毛sha|zhazhalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkmush毛sha|gozhazhalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhazhalmush毛sha|gokizhazhalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhazhalmurosha|zhazhalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhazhalnkmurosha|gozhazhalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhazhalmurosha|gokizhazhalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhazhal|zhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙zh忙l|zh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhazhal|hozhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙zh忙l|hozh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhazhal|hohozhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙zh忙l|hohozh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhazhal|n眉zhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙zh忙l|n眉zh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhazhal|n眉n眉zhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙zh忙l|n眉n眉zh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhazhal|n茂zhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙zh忙l|n茂zh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhazhal|n茂n茂zhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙zh忙l|n茂n茂zh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhazhal|luzhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙zh忙l|luzh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhazhal|luluzhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙zh忙l|luluzh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhazhal|lizhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙zh忙l|lizh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhazhal|lilizhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙zh忙l|lilizh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhazhal|kozhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙zh忙l|kozh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhazhal|kokozhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙zh忙l|kokozh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhazhal|kezhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙zh忙l|kezh忙zh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhazhal|kekezhazhal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙zh忙l|kekezh忙zh忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
